China's table tennis athlete Ma Long and synchronized swimmer Feng Yu have been named as the Chinese delegation's flag bearers for the opening ceremony of the 2024 Paris Olympic Games, the Chinese delegation announced on Wednesday.

title: Ma Long, Feng Yu named China's flag bearers for Paris 2024 - CGTN
author: CGTN
description: China's table tennis athlete Ma Long and synchronized swimmer Feng Yu have been named as the Chinese delegation's flag bearers for the opening ceremony of the 2024 Paris Olympic Games, the Chinese delegation announced on Wednesday.
